name: ai-cli-ref
description: Send file references to AI CLI terminals (Claude Code, Qoder CLI, etc.)

commands.title: Insert File Reference to AI CLI Terminal

ai-cli-ref.terminalNames.description: Terminal names to target. The extension will look for terminals with these names (e.g., 'claude' for Claude Code, 'qodercli' for Qoder CLI).

ai-cli-ref.keybinding.description: Default keybinding hint (actual binding is set via Keyboard Shortcuts UI: search 'ai-cli-ref.send')
